# Agentic Set for Wiki2 Books

This agentic set provides specialized, genealogical, recursive, and culturally-aware agents for collaborative work on all books in the Wiki2 project. Use these agents for writing, visual, and cross-synthesis tasks that honor whakapapa, lateral bridges, and Māori concepts.


## Agents

### Book Writers Collective Agent
- **Role:** Dynamic, self-growing group of unique writers for all books (HTML/Markdown)
- **File:** .github/agents/book-writers-collective.agent.md
- **Example Prompts:**
  - "Invite a new writer with a poetic style to join the collective."
  - "Let the collective debate the meaning of whakapapa in Plantlings.md."
  - "Have two writers co-author a new section in Rhizome.md."
  - "Grow the collective with a Māori language specialist."

### Book Artists Collective Agent
- **Role:** Dynamic, self-growing group of unique artists for all book visuals (HTML/Markdown)
- **File:** .github/agents/book-artists-collective.agent.md
- **Example Prompts:**
  - "Invite a new artist with a surrealist style to join the collective."
  - "Let the collective collaborate on a visual for Druidic-Seedlings.html."
  - "Have two artists co-create a diagram for Rhizome.md."
  - "Grow the collective with a Māori visual storyteller."

### Book Writer Agent
- **Role:** Genealogical, recursive, and culturally-aware writing, editing, and content management for all books (HTML/Markdown)
- **File:** .github/agents/book-writer.agent.md
- **Example Prompts:**
  - "Draft a new chapter about the Druidic Seedlings, including whakapapa links."
  - "Edit the introduction in Forked-Paths.html for clarity and add recursive prompts."
  - "Summarize the main themes in Planter-Dialogue.md and update frontmatter."
  - "Create a cross-synthesis page between Plantlings and Rhizome."

### Book Visual Artist Agent
- **Role:** Genealogical, recursive, and culturally-aware visuals, illustrations, and image management for all books (HTML/Markdown)
- **File:** .github/agents/book-visual-artist.agent.md
- **Example Prompts:**
  - "Suggest an illustration for the Druidic Seedlings chapter that reflects its whakapapa."
  - "Create a diagram for Planter-Dialogue.md showing lateral bridges."
  - "Edit the visuals in K-Mycelium.html for thematic and cultural alignment."
  - "Design a visual cross-synthesis between Plantlings and Rhizome."

## How to Use
- Select the appropriate agent for your task (writing or visuals)
- Use example prompts or create your own
- Agents are optimized for genealogy, recursion, and cultural/creative consistency

## Related Customizations
- Thematic Consistency Skill (for style checks)
- Visual Consistency Skill (for visual checks)
- Whakapapa Linker/Visualizer Skills (for genealogy and recursive linking)
